tags.name: Cfg_HasFailToStopAlm

tags.name: Sts_Running

eventScripts.script:
if initialChange or currentValue.value != previousValue.value:
		if currentValue.value == 1:
				base_path='[.]'
				base_list=[
				base_path + "Air_Supply_Temp_Alm_Hi_SP.Enabled",
				base_path + "Air_Supply_Temp_Alm_Lo_SP.Enabled",
				base_path + "High_Temperature_Supply_Air.Enabled",
				base_path + "Low_Temperature_Supply_Air.Enabled",
				base_path + "Air_Return_Temp_Alm_Hi_SP.Enabled",
				base_path + "Air_Return_Temp_Alm_Lo_SP.Enabled",
				base_path + "High_Temperature_Return_Air.Enabled",
				base_path + "Low_Temperature_Return_Air.Enabled"
				]
				response=system.tag.writeAsync(base_list,[False,False,False,False,True,True,True,True])	
		elif currentValue.value == 2:
				base_path='[.]'
				base_list=[
				base_path + "Air_Supply_Temp_Alm_Hi_SP.Enabled",
				base_path + "Air_Supply_Temp_Alm_Lo_SP.Enabled",
				base_path + "High_Temperature_Supply_Air.Enabled",
				base_path + "Low_Temperature_Supply_Air.Enabled",
				base_path + "Air_Return_Temp_Alm_Hi_SP.Enabled",
				base_path + "Air_Return_Temp_Alm_Lo_SP.Enabled",
				base_path + "High_Temperature_Return_Air.Enabled",
				base_path + "Low_Temperature_Return_Air.Enabled"
				]
				response=system.tag.writeAsync(base_list,[True,True,True,True,False,False,False,False])
